title: Seo Services
html:
SEO GROWTH ARCHITECTURE

Dominating search results with advanced data-driven 3D web optimization.

On-Page SEO

Semantic HTML5 and schema-rich structures for maximum visibility.

Tech SEO

Server-side hydration and flat-file performance tuning.

3D Optimization

Lightweight WebGL rendering that scores 100 on PageSpeed.

Start Growing Now
css: .seo-hero { color: #fff; padding: 100px 20px; text-align: center; } .neon-text { font-size: 4rem; font-weight: 900; background: linear-gradient(45deg, #4facfe, #00f2fe); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; margin-bottom: 20px; } .seo-desc { font-size: 1.2rem; color: #888; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto 50px; } .seo-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 30px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; } .s-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 40px 20px; border-radius: 20px; transition: 0.3s; } .s-card:hover { transform: translateY(-10px); background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.05); border-color: #4facfe; } .s-card h3 { color: #4facfe; margin-bottom: 15px; } .cta-btn { display: inline-block; margin-top: 60px; background: linear-gradient(45deg, #4facfe, #00f2fe); color: #000; padding: 15px 40px; border-radius: 50px; font-weight:700; text-decoration: none; }
